hasHeader.description: Whether the CSV dataset file contains a header row.

version.description: Version number of this dataset version.

createdBy.description: User who created this dataset version.
createdBy.title: UserInfo

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when this version was created.

fileName.description: Original filename of the uploaded dataset file.

mediaType.description: MIME type of the dataset file. Accepts text/csv or text/tsv.

workspaceId.description: Workspace numeric identifier where the dataset version is stored.

url.description: Pre-signed URL for downloading the dataset version file.

linkedSource.description: Linked external source details for a linked dataset version.

changeStatus.description: Computed change detection status for the linked dataset source.
changeStatus.title: ChangeStatus

checkedAt.description: Timestamp of the last change detection check. Can be `null` if never checked.

hasChangeIndicators.description: When true, the remote source provides ETag or Content-Length headers for change detection.

url.description: External URL linked to this dataset version.

linkedSource.title: LinkedSourceDto

version.description: Dataset version metadata containing information about a specific version of a dataset. Each dataset upload creates a new version.
version.title: DatasetVersionDto
